mods.name: Agent's Individual Item Kits
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: 2,052 individual item kits. Fair pricing based on complexity (5-300 credits). Complete Workshop expansion for precise inventory management.

mods.name: Agent's BioLab
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: All 10 Bio Lab Legendary weapons available in the Workshop. Includes Frontier Revolver, Kinetic Rifle, Tactical Bow, and 7 more. 1,000 Exotics each.

mods.name: Culinex Food Boost Fix
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Fixes Chef's Backpack 25% food effectiveness boost for all 191 foods including animal feeds. Tooltips show boosted stats and Food Rating (S/A/B/C/D) based on efficiency per stomach slot.

mods.name: Dev Tools Kit
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Unlocks 10 hidden developer tools including Thor's Hammer (fly mode), Transform Tool, Destroy Tool, Inspection Tool, Fireball, Pyromancy Flame, and more. All free to craft!

mods.name: FastProcessing All 5x
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: All crafting and processing 5x faster. 3,677 recipes covering base game + Workshop Recyclers, Hidden Building Pieces, No Food Spoilage, Turret Variants, Culinex Food Boost Fix.

mods.name: FastProcessing All 10x
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: All crafting and processing 10x faster. 3,677 recipes covering base game + Workshop Recyclers, Hidden Building Pieces, No Food Spoilage, Turret Variants, Culinex Food Boost Fix.

mods.name: FastProcessing All 15x
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: All crafting and processing 15x faster. 3,677 recipes covering base game + Workshop Recyclers, Hidden Building Pieces, No Food Spoilage, Turret Variants, Culinex Food Boost Fix.

mods.name: FastProcessing All 25x
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: All crafting and processing 25x faster. 3,677 recipes covering base game + Workshop Recyclers, Hidden Building Pieces, No Food Spoilage, Turret Variants, Culinex Food Boost Fix.

mods.name: FastProcessing Instant
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: All crafting and processing instant. 3,677 recipes covering base game + Workshop Recyclers, Hidden Building Pieces, No Food Spoilage, Turret Variants, Culinex Food Boost Fix.

mods.name: Indestructible Tools & Weapons
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Maximum durability on all tools, weapons, armor, buildings, doors, and crafting stations. 191 items modified to never break.

mods.name: No Food Spoilage
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Prevents all food items and volatile substances from spoiling. Includes 85 composter recipes to manually create Spoiled Meat from raw meats, fish, and fillets.

mods.name: Modular Affliction Adjuster
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Comprehensive affliction adjustment - reduces stat penalties by ~50%, extends escalation times by ~50%, and reduces damage over time by ~50%. Covers all 80+ player afflictions.

mods.name: Modular Buff Enhancer
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Comprehensive buff enhancement - 83 core buffs plus 156 food buffs, all boosted by ~50%. Stronger tonics, better food effects, enhanced bed healing, and more.

mods.name: Hidden Building Pieces
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Unlocks 104 hidden building items. Storm immune & hammer repairable. Includes diagonal/curved sets (9 materials), frames (11 materials), corner stairs (11 materials), roof peaks (15 materials). 500 building pieces, 291 skins.

mods.name: Workshop Recyclers
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Two recycling machines based on Biofuel Bio-Cleaner (T3) and Organic Residue Cleanser (T4). 1,657 recipes returning 100% of original Workshop costs. Hammer repairable. v4.4: Fixed 138 broken item references (Meta_Resource, Platinum_Sheath, FactionMission_Tech, AlphaWolf_Head, etc).

mods.name: Always Show Buildings On Map
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Always shows player-built structures on the map and minimap without requiring radar or special stats.

mods.name: Turret Variants
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: 15 new automated turret variants with unique firing patterns. v2.5: Hammer repairable + backwards shooting fix. Includes Crossbow, Bow, Sniper, Assault Rifle, SMG, Javelin, Flamethrower, Rock, Minigun, Rifle, Pistol, Shotblaster, Rapid Crossbow, Storm, and Heavy Sniper turrets.

mods.name: Waste Not
mods.author: CritFail / AgentKush
mods.description: Mining yields useful secondary resources instead of Stone. Normal ores give bonus of the same type, dense metal ores drop Exotics. Coal gives Charcoal, Ice gives Oxite. Covers all 26 mineable deposit types.

mods.name: Extended Wire and Pipe Tool
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: 10x range extension for all power cables and pipes. Power cables 60m, water pipes 60m, biofuel pipes 60m, crude oil pipes 100m. PAK mod - modifies Blueprint asset. All players and server must have it installed for multiplayer.

mods.name: Performance Optimizer
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Comprehensive FPS optimization - PAK config overrides (foliage/shadow/fog/LOD reduction) plus data table changes (reduced spawns, slower hordes, extended decay, boosted fuel, weather tuning). PAK + EXMODZ required.

mods.name: Tier Upgrade Forge
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Upgrade tools and weapons to the next tier without rebuilding from scratch. 26 upgrade recipes across pickaxes, axes, knives, spears, swords, and bows.

mods.name: Armor Set Bonuses Enhanced
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Enhanced armor set bonuses with 3-piece partial bonuses for mix-and-match builds. 33 sets get a 3-piece threshold (~40% bonus) plus boosted 5-piece bonuses (+75% positive, +50% resistances).

mods.name: Exotic Economy Overhaul
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Full exotic currency exchange system with 34 recipes. Convert between exotic types, buy rare materials with exotics, sell surplus ores for exotics. All at Fabricator.

mods.name: Hardcore Rebalance Pack
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: For survivors who think Icarus is too easy. 671 changes across 11 data tables + 3 binary curve overrides + 2 blueprint overrides: LEVEL CAP 170 (unlock ALL 280 talents + 586 blueprints via PAK mod), ENRAGED CREATURES (3x faster enrage, 4.5x longer rage via BP override), WALL-ATTACK FIX (creatures need line of sight), LIMITED LIVES (Easy=3, Medium=1, Hard=PERMADEATH), SURVIVAL PRESSURE (reduced HP + slower crafting), REVENGE SPAWNS (longer respawn delays + further distances), CREATURE SCALING on all difficulties, 12 Alpha Hunter bosses with gear drops + 89 workshop loot items, +50% kill XP, difficulty-scaled bonuses, DEADLY LIGHTNING STORMS, full 167/167 prospect coverage. REQUIRES both EXMOD and PAK file.

mods.name: Trap and Defense Expansion
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: 23 defense recipes using real game items. Unlocks 4 elemental landmines (Poison/Burn/Shock/Freeze) previously enemy-only. Cheap early-game fortifications, traps without rare drops, and batch packs.

mods.name: Stack Size Overhaul
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Increases stack sizes on 1,232 items. Resources/ammo/ores 5x, everything else 3x. Max cap 9999. Unstackable items unchanged.

mods.name: Faster Crafting
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Halves crafting time on 952 recipes across all workbenches. Minimum 500mJ to prevent instant-craft.

mods.name: Extended Spoil Timers
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Extends decay timers on 29 items. Food 5x longer, other decay 3x longer. Not compatible with Hardcore Rebalance Pack.

mods.name: Ammo Crafting Overhaul
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: 50 new ammo recipes. 50x batch crafting for all arrow and bullet types including special ammo. Plus 8 ammo conversion recipes.

mods.name: Fish and Farming Boost
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: 335 changes: crops grow 2x faster, harvests +50%, +2 cultivations, fish spawns doubled, fish quality +50%.

mods.name: Creature Drop Enhancer
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Doubles all creature butchery and skinning outputs across 62 recipes. 2x leather, bone, fur, meat, and rare drops.

mods.name: Creature Difficulty Scaling
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Full creature difficulty overhaul for level 500 cap. Scales all 161 spawn zones (max level 500), buffs 136 creatures by tier, adds player-level scaling rules. Designed for JimK72 Level Cap 500 mod.

mods.name: More Eye Colours
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Massive eye color expansion - 60 new colors across greens, ambers, purples, blues, greys, reds, and exotics (69 total). Plus unlocked hidden content.

mods.name: Night Vision Goggles
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Unlocks the hidden Night Vision system built into Icarus. Craft Night Vision Goggles at the Fabricator - equip and right-click to toggle green-tinted enhanced vision with 8x brightness.
